message.deleteAssetConfirm: Delete "{{ label }}" from the library? This cannot be undone.

empty.noAssetsForKind: {kind, select, cover {No cover assets yet. Upload one to get started.} sprite {No sprite assets yet. Upload one to get started.} background {No background assets yet. Upload one to get started.} ambient {No ambient audio yet. Upload one to get started.} sfx {No sound effects yet. Upload one to get started.} other {No assets yet. Upload one to get started.}}
empty.noAssetsMatchTag: No assets match the current tag filter.

upload.cover: JPEG, PNG, WebP or AVIF. Wide images work best (16:9), at least 1280px wide. Larger images are downscaled and re-encoded as WebP automatically.
upload.background: JPEG, PNG, WebP or AVIF. Wide images work best (16:9), at least 1280px wide. Larger images are downscaled and re-encoded as WebP automatically.
upload.sprite: JPEG, PNG, WebP or AVIF. Portrait orientation works best, up to 1440×2560 — larger images are downscaled. Transparent areas are preserved.
upload.audio: Opus, AAC, or MP3 (.webm, .ogg, .opus, .m4a, .aac, .mp3). AAC (.m4a) or Ogg-Opus play in every browser including Safari; WebM-Opus is best on Chromium/Firefox.

crop.title: Crop image
crop.instructions: Drag the box to frame your crop, or pick a different aspect ratio.
crop.dimensions: Crop area {{ width }} by {{ height }} pixels
crop.areaLabel: Crop area. Arrow keys move it; Shift with arrow keys resizes it.
